name: Aunt Lucille Wanderer's Tamale Pie
recipeInstructions:
Sauce:
1. Tomato soup 1 cup
2. Butter or margarine, melted 1/4 cup
3. Chili powder 2 tbsp
Stir ingredients together in the order given above. Pour into a large casserole dish or 9-inch x 13-inch pan. Bake uncovered at 350 degrees for approximately 1 hour or until solid, dry and golden brown.
Sauce: Blend ingredients together with a wire whisk. Serve with sauce over top of individual servings.
Options:
Can be cooked in a microwave on high for approximately 20 minutes.
One half of mixed Tamale Pie ingredients may be frozen for baking at a later date.
